title: pelargonium × polyanthon
intro: Pelargonium × polyanthon, also known as the Mountain Geranium or Cape Geranium, is a hybrid plant species within the Geraniaceae family, a cross between Pelargonium cucullatum and Pelargonium peltatum. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Pelargonium × polyanthon include relief from stress, anxiety, and insomnia, as well as the treatment of digestive issues and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Pelargonium × polyanthon include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to reap its medicinal benefits and promote overall well-being.
